selected.target_profile: Profitable Ukrainian R&D business developing drones, sensors and autonomy software for infrastructure inspection, agriculture, mapping and industrial safety; no weapons activity.
selected.location: Kyiv/Lviv/Ivano-Frankivsk engineering hubs; export-led and nationally scalable
selected.structure: Preferred equity; board seat; founder vesting; IP assignment; civilian-revenue covenant
selected.use_of_funds: Product certification, localized components, EU sales, test equipment and selective tuck-ins
selected.milestones: 60%+ civilian hard-currency revenue; EBITDA margin >20%; two EU channel partners
selected.downside_control: Tranched funding, IP security, end-use compliance, key-person insurance, civilian revenue floor
selected.exit: Strategic sale to European industrial-technology, inspection or autonomy platform

selected.target_profile: Mid-sized crusher/extruder producing high-protein meal, food ingredients and oil from traceable Ukrainian crops for EU buyers.
selected.location: Vinnytsia, Khmelnytskyi, Ternopil or Lviv oblast
selected.structure: Preferred growth equity; feedstock/off-take conditions precedent; inventory controls
selected.use_of_funds: Processing line, storage, quality lab, energy resilience and working capital
selected.milestones: Secure 70% feedstock; EU traceability compliance; contracted export channel
selected.downside_control: Borrowing-base controls, hedged/contracted feedstock, equipment collateral
selected.exit: Sale to regional agribusiness or food-ingredient consolidator

selected.target_profile: Expansion of a western/central Ukrainian producer of dry mixes, insulation, precast components or recycled aggregate with reconstruction contracts.
selected.location: Lviv, Rivne, Zhytomyr, Vinnytsia or Khmelnytskyi oblast
selected.structure: Preferred equity with equipment security, procurement controls and customer concentration limits
selected.use_of_funds: Modern line, heat/power resilience, molds, recycled feedstock and working capital
selected.milestones: Two anchor contractors; 65% utilization; product certification; positive unit margins
selected.downside_control: Phased equipment orders, hard-asset collateral, minimum-price clauses
selected.exit: Strategic sale to regional building-products group or management buyout

selected.target_profile: Portfolio of rooftop solar, battery storage and gas/biomass backup serving creditworthy food, logistics and light-industrial off-takers.
selected.location: Lviv, Zakarpattia, Vinnytsia, Ternopil and Khmelnytskyi oblasts
selected.structure: Asset SPV; 7-10 year take-or-pay PPAs; step-in rights; insured equipment
selected.use_of_funds: Generation, BESS, interconnection, controls and reserve equipment
selected.milestones: Contract 80% of capacity before build; phased commissioning; DSCR-ready reporting
selected.downside_control: Multiple off-takers, modular phases, equipment security, political-risk insurance pursuit
selected.exit: Yield platform sale to infrastructure/energy investor after operating track record

dataCaveat: Ukrstat enterprise series exclude temporarily occupied territories and parts of territories where military actions are/were conducted; comparisons spanning 2022 require caution.
